[...]
Vimec Applied Vision Technology is the specialist & leader in Glass Inspection and Monitoring Solutions for Pharmaceutical glass packaging. Vimec's inspection systems ensure the quality of Ampules, Vials, Syringes, Cartridges. 

We offer in-line dimensional, cosmetic & print inspection systems for new & existing lines. We also offer an unique solution for automated off-line sample measurement for SPC & validation. All systems are validated following strict validation protocols based on GAMP.
[...]
In our market, we are dedicated to designing, building and validating superior visual inspection systems. The data generated by our hard- and software, enables our customers to raise product- and process-quality to the highest level.

companies.shortDescription:
Matrix BV. # Matrix BV

Matrix BV is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Matrix is a company that specializes in industrial automation and offers custom inspection systems for the textile industry and applications for automatic cutting systems. They provide solutions for automatic cuts and have a unique scanner called the mas (multi array scanner) that consists of multiple 2d cameras.

companies.name: COMVIS
companies.shortDescription:
COMVIS. # COMVIS (ComVis ApS)

COMVIS is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. COMVIS is a company that provides automated fabric inspection systems and software for surface defect detection. They offer a range of products including VIU™ and Profiler™, which are used for narrow and wide fabrics, technical textiles, and other surfaces. COMVIS employs 7 people. Headquartered in Netherlands, with presence in United Kingdom.

## About
COMVIS is specialized in development of software and inspection systems for automated surface inspection. With over 20 years of experience, we provide our customers flexible automated solutions for quality determination of all kinds of surfaces. For instance woven and non-woven materials, (industrial) fabrics, filters, sieves, paper and foils.

With the use of our vision inspection systems, equipped with COMVIS Texplorer™ software, millions of meters of material is inspected for spots, stains, scratches, warp and weft defects, broken filaments, edge and other deviations in the surface.

## Company Details

companies.name: Luo Automation
companies.shortDescription:
Luo Automation. Luo Automation is a Robotics Engineering company. Luo is a company that specializes in automated visual inspection for small and medium-sized batches. They offer a scalable assistant that executes the visual inspection of medicine. With their patented vi-module and vi-detect, they provide high-quality and traceable insights, speed-up production, increased quality and consistency, and reduced workload. Luo Automation employs 14 people (+38.5% YoY, +5 people), founded in 2019. Headquartered in Delft, South Holland, Netherlands, with presence in France and Italy.
[...]
At Luo, we believe the quality of injectables should not depend on human judgement.
[...]
We provide fully automated visual inspection solutions for small-batch pharmaceutical production, replacing and improving the traditional manual and semi-automated inspection methods. Our proven solutions ensure consistent quality while delivering significant gains in speed and cost-effectiveness.
[...]
Combining the latest advancements in AI, machine learning and automation, we improve small-scale visual inspection one container at a time.
